title: cyperus marginatus
intro: Cyperus marginatus, also known as the thread-leaved umbrella sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus marginatus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, Cyperus marginatus is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and can also be used as a tincture or added to topical creams for its therapeutic benefits.
